info.title: HOME - JIEJOE | 视觉设计者
info.bodyText: LOADING CONTACT BE WILD! CREATIVE! AND COOL! - SCROLL CAREFULLY, IT'S SMOOTH - 小 · 心 · 地 · 滑 ABOUT ME Hello, this is JIEJOE, a visual designer Let's do some cool things :) PORTRAIT PORTRAIT PORTRAIT PORTRAIT WHAT SKILLS DO I HAVE I'M A GRAPHIC DESIGNER 爱做一些奇奇怪怪的设计 01 I'M A VIDEO EDITOR 爱剪一些莫名其妙的视频 02 I'M A UX DESIGNER 爱做一些不拘一格的交互 03 FULL OF CREATIVITY ABLE TO IMAGINE READY TO CREATE VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST VISUAL FIRST 视 觉 至 上 P O R T F O L I O JIEJOE的剪
